args: Implement the three-layer config cascade (project fab/project/config.yaml > system ~/.fab-kit/config.yaml > built-in defaults) in fab config loader, using per-field deep merge: maps merge per-key (existing agent.tiers precedent), lists replace (never concatenate), scalars replace. Enforce scope: a project-scoped field present in the system file is ignored with a warning (fail-open, config must never brick). Add fab config show --origin showing effective config with per-field provenance (git config --show-origin precedent). Add fab config init --system that writes a ~/.fab-kit/config.yaml scaffold containing ONLY scope=system/both fields, all commented, generated from the same field-metadata table shipped in the prior change (260708-ff2v-config-reference-metadata-table) so it cannot drift. See fab/plans/sahil/config-upgrade.md Change 2 for full context.
